falsification_conditions.condition: Price fails to break above the 2022 May Luna peak (15% resistance level) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Would indicate the pattern is not repeating, invalidating the blowoff scenario

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume declines below 50% of the 2022 May Luna average daily volume for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Suggests lack of market participation, contradicting blowoff dynamics which require escalating volume

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above its 200-day moving average without a subsequent pullback
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates sustained bullish momentum, refuting the blowoff top hypothesis

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
